Application Received

Thank you for
your interest in
building this with me.

I'm genuinely thrilled that you took the time to apply. HR Compliance Compass is my commitment to building the most comprehensive, plain-English employment law platform available at this price point — and the people who join early are the reason it becomes what it's meant to be.

I review every application personally. You'll hear from me within 24 hours with next steps. I'm looking forward to having you along for this.

Didn't receive a confirmation email within 24 hours?
Reach out directly at [email protected] and I'll get back to you right away.
